prestazioni: M177 DE40 AL 4.0L V8 Biturbo (M177 engine code) hybrid turbo upgrade with Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (86mm compressor wheels, 1.15 A/R turbine housings) paired with custom AMG Performance Studio downpipes (3.5" diameter, 409 stainless steel, catted for emissions compliance) and a Weistec Engineering Stage 3 ECU/TCU flash (optimized for 93 octane + E85 flex-fuel, 750+ WHP target with 900 Nm torque ceiling)

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Wavetrac limited-slip differential (AMG-specific 3.72:1 ratio) with Quaife ATB helical LSD for the front axle, paired with a Mercedes-AMG Carbon Ceramic Brake System (CCM) upgrade (420mm front/390mm rear rotors with yellow-painted monoblock calipers) and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/35 ZR22 front, 325/30 ZR22 rear) on HRE FF01 forged wheels (22x10.5 ET25 front, 22x12 ET45 rear)

Suspension overhaul with KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 80mm stroke, 12-level rebound damping) featuring AMG-specific spring rates (14kg/mm front, 16kg/mm rear) and Ohlins TTX46ML dampers for the rear axle, paired with Eibach Pro-Spacer wheel spacers (15mm front, 25mm rear) and a Weistec Engineering front sway bar (24mm adjustable)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (GLE 63 Coupe-specific, carbon fiber fenders with 50mm flares, integrated canards, and a ducktail spoiler extension) finished in Selenite Grey Magno with matte black accents, paired with a Vorsteiner V-FF103 front lip and rear diffuser (carbon fiber, 3D-scanned for OEM fitment)

AMG Night Package II (blacked-out grilles, window trim, and exhaust tips) with custom HRE CF107 carbon fiber mirror caps (painted to match Selenite Grey) and a Lumma Design CLR GLE 63S front bumper lip (carbon fiber, aggressive 30mm drop with integrated LED fog light delete)

Interior: Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber backs, Alcantara/leather upholstery with red contrast stitching) wrapped in AMG Performance steering wheel (flat-bottom, microfiber suede) and a full carbon fiber trim package (door cards, center console, dashboard) from Carbonskin, paired with a custom roll cage (T45 steel, 6-point, bolt-in) by Status Racing
